name: OpenAI
tagline: Large language models, embeddings, image generation, speech.
security: API keys (sk-…) are user-scoped — restrict by creating project-scoped keys when possible.
Never embed keys in client-side code; always proxy through a server-side handler.
Use structured outputs (response_format: json_schema) when downstream code consumes the output programmatically.
Set usage limits at the project level — runaway loops can be expensive.

patterns.name: RAG pipeline
patterns.description: Embed documents, store in a vector DB, retrieve top-k, pass as context to chat completion.

patterns.name: Structured extraction
patterns.description: Use response_format with a JSON schema to extract structured data from unstructured text.

patterns.name: Agent tool use
patterns.description: Define tools the model can call to take real-world actions.

actions.name: Chat completion
actions.description: Generate a text response from a prompt or conversation.

actions.name: Generate embedding
actions.description: Convert text to a vector embedding (for semantic search / RAG).

actions.name: Generate image
actions.description: Generate an image from a text prompt.

actions.name: Moderation check
actions.description: Classify text for safety policy violations.

auth.description: Bearer token API key. Server-side only.
